option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>

<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml"
            fx:controller="controllers.EvaluationController"
            prefWidth="1400" prefHeight="900">
    <style>
        .root {
            -fx-font-family: "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
            -fx-font-smooth-type: gray;
        }
        .header-section {
            -fx-background-color: #ffffff;
            -fx-border-color: #e8e8e8;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 2 0;
            -fx-padding: 20;
        }
        .page-title {
            -fx-font-size: 28;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-text-fill: #1a1a1a;
            -fx-text-alignment: left;
        }
        .header-button {
            -fx-padding: 10 25;
            -fx-font-size: 13;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-background-color: #007bff;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .header-button:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #0056b3;
            -fx-effect: dropshadow(three-pass-box, rgba(0, 91, 179, 0.3), 5, 0, 0, 2);
        }
        .search-section {
            -fx-padding: 15 20;
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
            -fx-border-color: #e8e8e8;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;
        }
        .search-field {
            -fx-padding: 10 12;
            -fx-font-size: 12;
            -fx-border-color: #d3d3d3;
            -fx-border-width: 1;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .search-field:focused {
            -fx-border-color: #007bff;
            -fx-effect: dropshadow(three-pass-box, rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.2), 5, 0, 0, 2);
        }
        .search-button {
            -fx-padding: 10 20;
            -fx-background-color: #28a745;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .search-button:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #218838;
        }
        .reset-button {
            -fx-padding: 10 20;
            -fx-background-color: #6c757d;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .reset-button:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #5a6268;
        }
        .table-view {
            -fx-font-size: 12;
            -fx-table-cell-border-color: #f0f0f0;
            -fx-padding: 0;
        }
        .table-view .column-header {
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
            -fx-text-fill: #2c3e50;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-font-size: 11;
            -fx-padding: 12 10;
            -fx-border-color: #dee2e6;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 2 0;
        }
        .table-view .table-row-cell {
            -fx-padding: 10;
            -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;
            -fx-font-size: 11;
        }
        .table-view .table-row-cell:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
        }
        .table-view .table-row-cell:selected {
            -fx-background-color: #e7f3ff;
        }
        .action-button-small {
            -fx-padding: 5 10;
            -fx-font-size: 10;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 3;
            -fx-min-width: 65;
        }
        .btn-view {
            -fx-background-color: #17a2b8;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .btn-view:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #138496;
        }
        .btn-edit {
            -fx-background-color: #ffc107;
            -fx-text-fill: #333;
        }
        .btn-edit:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #e0a800;
        }
        .btn-delete {
            -fx-background-color: #dc3545;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .btn-delete:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #c82333;
        }
        .btn-questions {
            -fx-background-color: #6f42c1;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .btn-questions:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #5a32a3;
        }
        .status-badge {
            -fx-padding: 5 10;
            -fx-font-size: 10;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-text-alignment: center;
            -fx-border-radius: 3;
        }
        .status-active {
            -fx-background-color: #28a745;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .status-upcoming {
            -fx-background-color: #ffc107;
            -fx-text-fill: #333;
        }
        .status-closed {
            -fx-background-color: #dc3545;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .footer-section {
            -fx-padding: 15 20;
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
            -fx-border-color: #dee2e6;
            -fx-border-width: 1 0 0 0;
            -fx-text-fill: #6c757d;
            -fx-font-size: 11;
        }
        .status-label {
            -fx-text-fill: #28a745;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
        }
    </style>

    <!-- Header with Title and Create Button -->
    <top>
        <VBox spacing="0">
            <HBox spacing="20" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="header-section">
                <VBox spacing="5" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <Label text=" Evaluation Management" styleClass="page-title"/>
                    <Label text="Create, manage, and track quiz evaluations"
                           style="-fx-text-fill: #6c757d; -fx-font-size: 12;"/>
                </VBox>
                <Button text="➕ Create New Evaluation" styleClass="header-button"
                        onAction="#handleAdd" HBox.hgrow="NEVER"/>
            </HBox>

            <!-- Search and Filter Section -->
            <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="search-section" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                <TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText=" Search evaluations by title..."
                           prefWidth="300" styleClass="search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                <Button text="Search" styleClass="search-button" onAction="#handleSearch"/>
                <Button text="Reset" styleClass="reset-button" onAction="#handleShowAll"/>
                <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" style="-fx-padding: 0 10;"/>
                <Label text="Total:" HBox.hgrow="NEVER" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                <Label fx:id="totalLabel" text="0" HBox.hgrow="NEVER"
                       style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #007bff;"/>
            </HBox>
        </VBox>
    </top>

    <!-- Main Content Area: Split View (Form + Table) -->
    <center>
        <SplitPane dividerPositions="0.35" style="-fx-focus-color: transparent; -fx-faint-focus-color: transparent;">
            <!-- Left: Form Panel -->
            <VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-background-color: white;" SplitPane.resizableWithParent="true">
                <Label text=" Evaluation Form" style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #1a1a1a;"/>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="Title" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="Enter evaluation title" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="Description" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextArea fx:id="descriptionField" prefRowCount="4" promptText="Enter description" wrapText="true" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <GridPane hgap="10" vgap="6">
                    <columnConstraints>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    </columnConstraints>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="0">
                        <Label text="Duration (min)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="dureeField" promptText="60" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="1">
                        <Label text="Max Score" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="noteMaxField" promptText="100" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                </GridPane>

                <GridPane hgap="10" vgap="6">
                    <columnConstraints>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    </columnConstraints>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="0">
                        <Label text="Pass Grade" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="notePassageField" promptText="50" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="1">
                        <Label text="Attempts" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="nbTentativesField" promptText="3" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                </GridPane>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="Start Date (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextField fx:id="dateDebutField" promptText="2026-05-04 09:00:00" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="End Date (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextField fx:id="dateFinField" promptText="2026-05-04 11:00:00" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10 0 0 0;">
                    <CheckBox fx:id="ordreAleatoireCheck" text="Random Order" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/>
                    <CheckBox fx:id="afficherCorrecCheck" text="Show Answers" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/>
                </HBox>

                <HBox spacing="8" style="-fx-padding: 10 0 0 0;">
                    <Button text="➕ Create" styleClass="search-button" onAction="#handleAdd" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    <Button text="✏ Update" style="-fx-padding: 10 20; -fx-background-color: #ffc107; -fx-text-fill: #333; -fx-cursor: hand;" onAction="#handleUpdate" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    <Button text=" Delete" styleClass="reset-button" onAction="#handleDelete" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    <Button text="Clear" styleClass="reset-button" onAction="#handleClear" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                </HBox>
            </VBox>

            <!-- Right: Dashboard Table -->
            <VBox spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: white;" SplitPane.resizableWithParent="true">
                <TableView fx:id="evaluationTable" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <columns>
                        <TableColumn text="Title" prefWidth="140"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Description" prefWidth="150"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Duration" prefWidth="70"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Pass" prefWidth="60"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Max" prefWidth="50"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Start Date" prefWidth="110"/>
                        <TableColumn text="End Date" prefWidth="110"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Status" prefWidth="80"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Actions" prefWidth="280"/>
                    </columns>
                </TableView>

                <Label fx:id="emptyLabel" text=" No evaluations found. Create one to get started!"
                       textAlignment="CENTER" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"
                       style="-fx-text-fill: #999; -fx-font-size: 14; -fx-padding: 50;"
                       visible="false" alignment="CENTER"/>
            </VBox>
        </SplitPane>
    </center>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <bottom>
        <HBox spacing="20" styleClass="footer-section" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
            <Label fx:id="statusLabel" text="✓ Ready" styleClass="status-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
            <Label text="EDUCORE © 2024 - Professional Quiz Management System"
                   style="-fx-text-fill: #999;"/>
        </HBox>
    </bottom>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<?import javafx.geometry.ColumnConstraints?>

<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml"
            fx:controller="controllers.EvaluationController"
            prefWidth="1400" prefHeight="900">
    <style>
        .root {
            -fx-font-family: "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
            -fx-font-smooth-type: gray;
        }
        .header-section {
            -fx-background-color: #ffffff;
            -fx-border-color: #e8e8e8;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 2 0;
            -fx-padding: 20;
        }
        .page-title {
            -fx-font-size: 28;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-text-fill: #1a1a1a;
            -fx-text-alignment: left;
        }
        .header-button {
            -fx-padding: 10 25;
            -fx-font-size: 13;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-background-color: #007bff;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .header-button:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #0056b3;
            -fx-effect: dropshadow(three-pass-box, rgba(0, 91, 179, 0.3), 5, 0, 0, 2);
        }
        .search-section {
            -fx-padding: 15 20;
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
            -fx-border-color: #e8e8e8;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;
        }
        .search-field {
            -fx-padding: 10 12;
            -fx-font-size: 12;
            -fx-border-color: #d3d3d3;
            -fx-border-width: 1;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .search-field:focused {
            -fx-border-color: #007bff;
            -fx-effect: dropshadow(three-pass-box, rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.2), 5, 0, 0, 2);
        }
        .search-button {
            -fx-padding: 10 20;
            -fx-background-color: #28a745;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .search-button:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #218838;
        }
        .reset-button {
            -fx-padding: 10 20;
            -fx-background-color: #6c757d;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 4;
        }
        .reset-button:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #5a6268;
        }
        .table-view {
            -fx-font-size: 12;
            -fx-table-cell-border-color: #f0f0f0;
            -fx-padding: 0;
        }
        .table-view .column-header {
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
            -fx-text-fill: #2c3e50;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-font-size: 11;
            -fx-padding: 12 10;
            -fx-border-color: #dee2e6;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 2 0;
        }
        .table-view .table-row-cell {
            -fx-padding: 10;
            -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0;
            -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;
            -fx-font-size: 11;
        }
        .table-view .table-row-cell:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
        }
        .table-view .table-row-cell:selected {
            -fx-background-color: #e7f3ff;
        }
        .action-button-small {
            -fx-padding: 5 10;
            -fx-font-size: 10;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-cursor: hand;
            -fx-border-radius: 3;
            -fx-min-width: 65;
        }
        .btn-view {
            -fx-background-color: #17a2b8;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .btn-view:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #138496;
        }
        .btn-edit {
            -fx-background-color: #ffc107;
            -fx-text-fill: #333;
        }
        .btn-edit:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #e0a800;
        }
        .btn-delete {
            -fx-background-color: #dc3545;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .btn-delete:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #c82333;
        }
        .btn-questions {
            -fx-background-color: #6f42c1;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .btn-questions:hover {
            -fx-background-color: #5a32a3;
        }
        .status-badge {
            -fx-padding: 5 10;
            -fx-font-size: 10;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
            -fx-text-alignment: center;
            -fx-border-radius: 3;
        }
        .status-active {
            -fx-background-color: #28a745;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .status-upcoming {
            -fx-background-color: #ffc107;
            -fx-text-fill: #333;
        }
        .status-closed {
            -fx-background-color: #dc3545;
            -fx-text-fill: white;
        }
        .footer-section {
            -fx-padding: 15 20;
            -fx-background-color: #f8f9fa;
            -fx-border-color: #dee2e6;
            -fx-border-width: 1 0 0 0;
            -fx-text-fill: #6c757d;
            -fx-font-size: 11;
        }
        .status-label {
            -fx-text-fill: #28a745;
            -fx-font-weight: bold;
        }
    </style>

    <!-- Header with Title and Create Button -->
    <top>
        <VBox spacing="0">
            <HBox spacing="20" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="header-section">
                <VBox spacing="5" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <Label text=" Evaluation Management" styleClass="page-title"/>
                    <Label text="Create, manage, and track quiz evaluations"
                           style="-fx-text-fill: #6c757d; -fx-font-size: 12;"/>
                </VBox>
                <Button text="➕ Create New Evaluation" styleClass="header-button"
                        onAction="#handleAdd" HBox.hgrow="NEVER"/>
            </HBox>

            <!-- Search and Filter Section -->
            <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="search-section" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                <TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText=" Search evaluations by title..."
                           prefWidth="300" styleClass="search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                <Button text="Search" styleClass="search-button" onAction="#handleSearch"/>
                <Button text="Reset" styleClass="reset-button" onAction="#handleShowAll"/>
                <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" style="-fx-padding: 0 10;"/>
                <Label text="Total:" HBox.hgrow="NEVER" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                <Label fx:id="totalLabel" text="0" HBox.hgrow="NEVER"
                       style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #007bff;"/>
            </HBox>
        </VBox>
    </top>

    <!-- Main Content Area: Split View (Form + Table) -->
    <center>
        <SplitPane dividerPositions="0.35" style="-fx-focus-color: transparent; -fx-faint-focus-color: transparent;">
            <!-- Left: Form Panel -->
            <VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-background-color: white;" SplitPane.resizableWithParent="true">
                <Label text=" Evaluation Form" style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #1a1a1a;"/>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="Title" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="Enter evaluation title" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="Description" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextArea fx:id="descriptionField" prefRowCount="4" promptText="Enter description" wrapText="true" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <GridPane hgap="10" vgap="6">
                    <columnConstraints>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    </columnConstraints>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="0">
                        <Label text="Duration (min)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="dureeField" promptText="60" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="1">
                        <Label text="Max Score" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="noteMaxField" promptText="100" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                </GridPane>

                <GridPane hgap="10" vgap="6">
                    <columnConstraints>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                        <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    </columnConstraints>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="0">
                        <Label text="Pass Grade" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="notePassageField" promptText="50" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                    <VBox spacing="6" GridPane.columnIndex="1">
                        <Label text="Attempts" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                        <TextField fx:id="nbTentativesField" promptText="3" styleClass="search-field"/>
                    </VBox>
                </GridPane>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="Start Date (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextField fx:id="dateDebutField" promptText="2026-05-04 09:00:00" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <VBox spacing="6">
                    <Label text="End Date (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
                    <TextField fx:id="dateFinField" promptText="2026-05-04 11:00:00" styleClass="search-field"/>
                </VBox>

                <HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 10 0 0 0;">
                    <CheckBox fx:id="ordreAleatoireCheck" text="Random Order" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/>
                    <CheckBox fx:id="afficherCorrecCheck" text="Show Answers" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/>
                </HBox>

                <HBox spacing="8" style="-fx-padding: 10 0 0 0;">
                    <Button text="➕ Create" styleClass="search-button" onAction="#handleAdd" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    <Button text="✏ Update" style="-fx-padding: 10 20; -fx-background-color: #ffc107; -fx-text-fill: #333; -fx-cursor: hand;" onAction="#handleUpdate" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    <Button text=" Delete" styleClass="reset-button" onAction="#handleDelete" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                    <Button text="Clear" styleClass="reset-button" onAction="#handleClear" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                </HBox>
            </VBox>

            <!-- Right: Dashboard Table -->
            <VBox spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: white;" SplitPane.resizableWithParent="true">
                <TableView fx:id="evaluationTable" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <columns>
                        <TableColumn text="Title" prefWidth="140"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Description" prefWidth="150"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Duration" prefWidth="70"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Pass" prefWidth="60"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Max" prefWidth="50"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Start Date" prefWidth="110"/>
                        <TableColumn text="End Date" prefWidth="110"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Status" prefWidth="80"/>
                        <TableColumn text="Actions" prefWidth="280"/>
                    </columns>
                </TableView>

                <Label fx:id="emptyLabel" text=" No evaluations found. Create one to get started!"
                       textAlignment="CENTER" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"
                       style="-fx-text-fill: #999; -fx-font-size: 14; -fx-padding: 50;"
                       visible="false" alignment="CENTER"/>
            </VBox>
        </SplitPane>
    </center>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <bottom>
        <HBox spacing="20" styleClass="footer-section" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
            <Label fx:id="statusLabel" text="✓ Ready" styleClass="status-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
            <Label text="EDUCORE © 2024 - Professional Quiz Management System"
                   style="-fx-text-fill: #999;"/>
        </HBox>
    </bottom>
</BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>tn.esprit</groupId> <artifactId>EDUCORE</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/mysql/mysql-connector-java --> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> <version>8.0.33</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-controls --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-controls</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-fxml --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-fxml</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-graphics --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-graphics</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-base --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-base</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> <build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <source>17</source> <target>17</target> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>0.0.8</version> <configuration> <mainClass>test.MainFx</mainClass> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>tn.esprit</groupId> <artifactId>EDUCORE</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/com.mysql/mysql-connector-j --> <dependency> <groupId>com.mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId> <version>9.0.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-controls --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-controls</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-fxml --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-fxml</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-graphics --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-graphics</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> <!-- Source: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.openjfx/javafx-base --> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-base</artifactId> <version>22.0.2</version> <scope>compile</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> <build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <source>17</source> <target>17</target> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>0.0.8</version> <configuration> <mainClass>test.MainFx</mainClass> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
